title: [codereview-pass1-init] coap_dtn.c: lichen_coap_deaddrop_register init sequence does not lock s_dtn_mutex around lichen_dtn_init/senml_pack_init/expire_old; race on first handler call. Also k_mutex_init after K_MUTEX_DEFINE is redundant. P0 race/security. Tagged codereview
close_reason: Locked s_dtn_buf_mutex around full init sequence (lichen_coap_dtn_init, lichen_dtn_init, expire_old, work schedule) preventing race on first handler call. Redundant k_mutex_init addressed by not including it. Tests/build verified. Commit: 109199762
